CONFIDENTIAL — NON-PUBLIC — Embargo until 2026-08-15 08:30 ET — Project Marigold
Data Processing Addendum between Harborcrest Therapeutics, Inc. (US issuer; Controller) and Pioneer Meridian Bank, N.A. (Processor) for employee, patient, and investor-relations workflows.
Scope: processing of CCPA consumer/household data, HIPAA PHI under a Business Associate arrangement, and GLBA customer information for co-branded patient financing.
MNPI segregation: Processor will maintain a restricted dataset for Project Marigold and IR draft materials to avoid selective disclosure under Reg FD.
Definitive Merger Agreement signed 2026-07-02; closing consideration up to $275,000,000 cash and stock, with a 12.5% earnout.
MAC/MAE: ordinary-course declines in clinical trial enrollment are carved out and shall not constitute a material adverse change.
Public data exception: information already filed by Harborcrest Therapeutics, Inc. on EDGAR in its FY2025 Form 10‑K summary is not treated as MNPI.
Retention: MNPI and PHI stored in US-only encrypted vaults; 7-year retention for GLBA records, 6-year HIPAA minimum, and 3-year deletion for marketing consents.
Access: only need-to-know bank analysts and Harborcrest IR staff; pre-briefing to sell-side analysts prohibited until the embargo lifts.
Data subject rights: DSAR requests (access, delete, correct, opt-out of sale/sharing) to privacy@harborcrestthera.com or 202-555-0143; verify identity via tokenized link.
Subprocessors: Redwood ByteWorks LLC (log monitoring) and Vestry Cloud Rail, Inc. (ETL) are approved; no offshore transfers without a transfer impact assessment and written consent.
Regulatory notification: Processor will notify Controller within 24 hours of a suspected breach and maintain incident tickets sufficient for SEC Reg S‑ID and state breach laws.
go-live checklist: update data map, confirm role-based access, coordinate with outside SEC counsel; schedule dry run before earnings blackout.
Mr. Alan K. Duarte, Chief Privacy Officer, confirms that the analyst Q&A deck and the Board memo are tagged “NONPUBLIC — PROJECT MARIGOLD — DO NOT DISTRIBUTE”.
This notice does not grant spa day vouchers, gift cards, or perks and does not modify employee at‑will status.
